'fiT.3lT.3151(31) ~ 23 mr,2015 imJ ~ eft 'l{ ~ I MINISTRY OF MINORITY AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th July, 2017 S.O. 2144(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 9 of the Waqf Act, 1995(43 of 1995) read with rule 4 and rule 5 of the Central WaqfCouncil Rules, 1998, the Central Government hereby makesthe followingamendmentsin the notificationof the Ministryof MinorityAffairsvide italicsnumber S.O.3151(E) dated the 23rd November, 2015, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part - II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) dated the 23rd November, 2015, namely :-- 2. In the said notification, under the heading Members appointed under sub-clause (v) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9, for serial number 14 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely :- "14. Justice (Retired) Naseem Uddin, Allahabad High Court, 26, Khair Nagar Bazar, Near Hauz Wali Masjid, Meerut City, Uttar Pradesh 250002." [F. No.8-1I2015-Waqf(Pt.II)] 1. ALAM, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification vide number S.O. 3151(E), dated the 23rd November, 2015 was published in the Gazette ofIndia, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (ii). Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-II 0064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-II 0054. -- 2 of 2 --
